_README: Accepted exceptions for `node scripts/i18n-audit.js` — literals that look like
user-facing copy but must not go through t(). Every entry carries a reason.
The audit fails on any hardcoded string NOT listed here, so this file is a
burndown list, not a mute button: shrink it, do not grow it.
Key format: "<repo-relative file> :: <the literal>" (line numbers deliberately
excluded so the list survives unrelated edits).
`orphans` works the same way for keys present in en/ but referenced nowhere.
It is empty because the backlog was pruned to zero; an entry belongs there
only for a key that must survive without a visible call site, with the reason.

hardcoded.client/lib/theme/theme-select.js :: Aa: Typographic specimen — the letterforms are the content, not a word to translate.
hardcoded.client/views/editor/ai-append.js :: LLM: Acronym used as-is in every locale.
hardcoded.client/views/editor/editor-form/slide-fo: Seeded block titles for a newly added row — deck content, not chrome. Same deck-language question as the sample content above.
Seeded block titles for a newly added row — deck content, not chrome. Same deck-language question as the sample content above.
Seeded block titles for a newly added row — deck content, not chrome. Same deck-language question as the sample content above.
hardcoded.client/views/editor/image-library/giphy-: Required attribution string — GIPHY brand guidelines mandate the English wording.
hardcoded.client/views/editor/modals/settings-moda: Language names are shown in their own language, by design.
Language names are shown in their own language, by design.
hardcoded.client/views/editor/slide-type-sample-co: Sample deck content for the slide-type picker thumbnails, not UI chrome. Localising it is a separate call: it seeds slide *content*, which should follow the deck language rather than the UI locale. Tracked as a follow-up.
